content.query:
-- 2023-05-05 Upgrading for TLCSQL Data Warehouse
-- DBO.M3_ Becomes M3.
-- Must COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS M3 Data to union with other CI columns
-- Fixed Date Conversions for M3 Data since date fields are dates now.  
CREATE VIEW TLC_Sales_Cube
AS
-- SELECT TOP 10 * FROM TLC_Sales_Cube
-- drop view TLC_Sales_Cube
SELECT          CASE WHEN Brand in ('EXCALIBUR', 'OMEGA') then 'Countertop' else Division end as Division, Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO]
,               [Order ID], Date, Brand, [Product Category], [Part ID], [Part Description]
,               [Supplier ID], [Sales Amt], [Sales Qty]
,               CASE WHEN [Sales Qty] >= 0 then 'Sales' else 'Returns' end as [Sales Type]
,               CASE WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020, 2021, 2022)        THEN [Cost AFS]
                WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) IN (1)        THEN [Cost AFS]
                WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) = (2023) and MONTH(Date) > 1            THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('MAXX COLD', 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL', 'MAXX ICE', 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL', 'GENERAL', 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'DUURA') AND YEAR(Date) > (2023)                                THEN [Cost M3]

                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020, 2021, 2022)                                                          THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) IN (1)                                                     THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) >= (2023) and MONTH(Date) > 1                                                        THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE', 'BEVLES', 'ZEROLL') AND YEAR(Date) > (2023)                                                                             THEN [Cost M3]

                WHEN Brand IN ('EMC')                                                                                                                               THEN [Cost G]

                WHEN Brand IN ('AVANTI') and YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5)                                                                THEN [Cost APR]
                WHEN Brand IN ('AVANTI') and YEAR(Date) IN (2023) and MONTH(Date) >= 6                                                                              THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('AVANTI') and YEAR(Date) > (2023)                                                                                                    THEN [Cost M3]

                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP', 'ELEMENT', 'APEX', 'BRAMA', 'WINEMATE', 'NON STOCK', 'MISCELLANEOUS', 'EPICUREANIST') AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020, 2021)                                                                                     THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') and YEAR(Date) = 2022 and MONTH(Date) IN (1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9)                                                             THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') and YEAR(Date) = 2022 and MONTH(Date) IN (10,11,12)                                                                      THEN [Cost M3]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') and YEAR(Date) >= 2023                                                                                                   THEN [Cost M3]                                                                                                                             

                WHEN Brand IN ('KOLD DRAFT')                                                                                                                        THEN [Cost K]

                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EDGECRAFT', 'OTHER', 'MAGIC COOL') AND Company <> 'G'                                                               THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                              THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2021                                                      THEN [Cost G]*.75
                WHEN Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL                                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                   THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                               THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                         THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost L] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                     THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)        THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)    THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                         THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                     THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                       THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                                             THEN [Cost L]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                              THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('EXCALIBUR') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                               THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                       THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                   THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                             THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost O] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                         THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)            THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)        THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                             THEN [Cost G]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                           THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4)                                                 THEN [Cost O]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                                  THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                                   THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                  THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                  THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)               THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)           THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                          THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                      THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                                        THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                                        THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                                     THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('WESTBEND') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                                THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                        THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                    THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)        THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost WBM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)    THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)     THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12) THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                THEN [Cost G]*.85
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company = 'G' AND [Cost ECM] IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                            THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2019, 2020)                                                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)                              THEN [Cost WBM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) IN (2021) AND MONTH(Date) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)                           THEN [Cost ECM]
                WHEN Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'YONANAS') AND Company <> 'G' AND YEAR(Date) >= 2022                                                                      THEN [Cost ECM]

                WHEN Brand IN ('Edgecraft')                                                                                                                         THEN [Cost ECM]
                END as Cost
                FROM
(
(               
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               A.[Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'a' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT CASE WHEN DF.Brand IN ('OMEGA', 'EXCALIBUR') THEN 'Commercial' ELSE DF.Division END as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand = 'OMEGA' THEN 'OMEGA AFS'
                WHEN DF.Brand = 'EXCALIBUR' THEN 'EXCALIBUR AFS'
				ELSE DF.Brand END AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AO_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCA_AE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = D.[Part ID]
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'l' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LB%' THEN 'BLAKESLEE' 
				WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LE%' THEN 'EXCALIBUR'
				WHEN ATD.SalesOrder LIKE 'LV%' THEN 'BEVLES' else DF.Brand end as [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost L]
FROM			SCL.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCL.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCL.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCL.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Company = 'L'
AND				(AC2.Category NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY') or AC2.Category is NULL)
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A
)
--good
UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               [Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'o' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost O]
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCO.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCO.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.UserField1 NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY', 'INTERCOMPA')
AND				AC.Customer <> 'ASB001'
AND				DF.Company = 'O'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OW_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCO_OA_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = E.[Part ID]
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'ge' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND             DF.Brand = 'EMC'
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               [Cost AFS]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'gcom' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
--,				NULL as [Cost Visual]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
WHERE			YEAR(ATD.InvoiceDate) = 2021-- >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Division <> 'Countertop'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND             DF.Brand <> 'EMC'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GA_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GL_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GAV_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GVI_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = E.[Part ID]
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               [Cost G]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'gcon' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
--,				NULL as [Cost Visual]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID collate database_default = P.ID
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				DF.Division = 'Countertop'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GLZEX_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GO_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GE_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_SCG_GW_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = E.[Part ID]
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               [Cost L]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost L]
,               [Cost O]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost O]
,               [Cost ECM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR] as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost VINO]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'e' as test
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct CASE WHEN P.USER_1 = 'VINOTEMP' THEN 'Vinotemp'  WHEN P.USER_1 = 'AVANTI' THEN 'Compact' ELSE 'Countertop' END as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               CPC.COST as [Cost ECM]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
--AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EL_Cost
) B             on A.Division = B.Division and A.Company = B.Company and A.[Customer ID] = B.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = B.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EAV_Cost
) C             on A.Division = C.Division and A.Company = C.Company and A.[Customer ID] = C.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = C.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = C.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EW_Cost
) D            on A.Division = D.Division and A.Company = D.Company and A.[Customer ID] = D.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = D.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = D.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EO_Cost
) E            on A.Division = E.Division and A.Company = E.Company and A.[Customer ID] = E.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = E.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = E.[Part ID]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          *
FROM            v_ECM_EVINO_Cost
) F            on A.Division = F.Division and A.Company = F.Company and A.[Customer ID] = F.[Customer ID] AND
                A.[Order ID] = F.[Order ID] and A.[Part ID] = F.[Part ID]
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               [Cost WBM]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'w' as test
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Countertop' as Division
,               'Westbend' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
,               (UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST) as [Cost WBM]
FROM            WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            WBM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		WBM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
--AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               [Cost K]*A.[Sales Qty] as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'k' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			'Commercial' as Division
,				'K' as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				'KOLD DRAFT' as Brand
,				IM.ProductClass as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced, 0) as [Cost K]
FROM			SCK.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCK.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCK.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCK.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
--AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A
)


UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'av' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			Distinct 'Compact' as Division
,				'Avanti' as Company
,				aih.[cust-key] as [Customer ID]
,				[cust-name] as [Customer Name]
,				[cust-po-number] as [Customer PO]
,				aih.[ref-num] as [Order ID]
,				aih.[ref-date] as [Date]
,				'AVANTI' as [Brand]
,				c.[short-description] as [Product Category]
,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID]
,				aii.[item-name] as [Part Description]
,				p.[primary-supplier-key] as [Supplier ID]
,				CASE WHEN [ref-num] like 'CM%' then [total-item-price]*-1 else [total-item-price] end as [Sales Amt]
,				CASE WHEN [ref-num] like 'CM%' then qty*-1 else qty end as as [Sales Qty]
,				aii.[total-sales-cost] as [Cost APR]
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
JOIN			APR.custname cn on aih.[cust-key] = cn.[cust-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.product p on aii.[item-key] = p.[product-key]
LEFT JOIN		APR.category c on p.[category-key] = c.[category-key]
WHERE			aih.[ref-date] >= '2019-01-01'
AND				aih.[cust-key] NOT IN ('23117', '23124')
--AND             aih.[ref-num] NOT LIKE 'CM%'
AND             C.[system-id] = 'Avanti'
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, A.[Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], A.[Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, A.[Product Category], A.[Part ID], A.[Part Description]
,               A.[Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], A.[Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               [Cost M3]/**A.[Sales Qty]*/ as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'vin' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			'Countertop' as Division
,				'Netsuite' as Company
,				cast(E.id as varchar(max)) as [Customer ID]
,				E.altname as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				cast(uniquekey as varchar(max)) as [Order ID]
,				trandate as [Date]
,				'VINOTEMP' as [Brand]
,				C.fullname as [Product Category]
,				CAST(itemid as varchar(max)) as [Part ID]
,				description as [Part Description]
,				I.vendorname as [Supplier ID]
,			    amount as [Sales Amt]
,				itemcount as [Sales Qty]
,				SI.costestimate/**-1.00/NULLIF(itemcount,0)*/ as [Cost M3]
FROM			NET.SalesInvoiced SI
JOIN			NET.Item I on SI.item = I.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Entity E on SI.entity = E.id
LEFT JOIN		NET.Class C on I.class = C.id
WHERE			trandate >= '2019-01-01'
--AND				amount > 0
AND				SI.type = 'CustInvc'
AND				itemid <> 'UNVERIFIED CREDITS'

UNION ALL

SELECT   distinct CASE WHEN IM.ITCL IN ('BEV', 'BLA', 'DUUR', 'GEN', 'MXC', 'MXI', 'PGEN', 'PMXC', 'PMXI', 'POME', 'SAP') then 'Commercial'
            WHEN IM.ITCL IN ('AVA') then 'Compact' else 'Countertop' end as Division
,         'M3' as Company
,          ODH.CUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer ID]
,          OC.CUNM COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer Name]
,          OL.CUOR COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Customer PO]
,          ODH.ORNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS AS [Order ID]
,          cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)  as [Date]
,          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS  IN ('AVA') then 'AVANTI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BLA' then 'BLAKESLEE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BEV' then 'BEVLES'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'MAXX COLD'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXC' then 'MAXX COLD - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EXC' then 'EXCALIBUR'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'GENERAL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PGEN' then 'GENERAL - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'MAXX ICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'PMXI' then 'MAXX ICE - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'DUUR' then 'DUURA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'OMEGA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'POME' then 'OMEGA - PRIVATE LABEL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'SAPPHIRE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'ZEROLL'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'YONANAS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'CHEFS CHOICE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'WESTBEND'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'VINTURI'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'ELEMENT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'APEX'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'VINOTEMP'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'BRAMA'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'WINEMATE'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'NON STOCK'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'MISCELLANEOUS'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT'
            WHEN IM.ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'EPICUREANIST'
            ELSE IM.ITCL END  as Brand
,          CS.TX40 as [Product Category]
,           IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID]
,           IM.ITDS COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part Description]
,           IM.SUNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Supplier ID]
,           OL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT as [Sales Amt]
,           ODL.IVQT as [Sales Qty]
,           OL.UCOS*ODL.IVQT as [Cost M3]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.PYNO = ODH.PYNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS on IM.ITGR = CS.STKY and STCO = 'ITGR'
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
--AND				LE.IVTP <> 'CN'
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, NULL as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, NULL as [Product Category], NULL as [Part ID], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'leg' as test
FROM
(
SELECT			'Commercial' as Division
,				'Legion' as Company
,				NULL as [Customer ID]
,				Customer as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				Invoice as [Order ID]
,				Date as [Date]
,				'LEGION' as [Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				NULL as [Part ID]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			    Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
FROM			SCK.LegionSales
WHERE           Customer NOT LIKE '%GWT%'
AND             Customer NOT LIKE '%GREENFIELD W%'
) A
)

UNION ALL

(
SELECT          A.Division, A.Company, NULL as [Customer ID], A.[Customer Name], NULL as [Customer PO]
,               A.[Order ID], A.Date, A.Brand, NULL as [Product Category], NULL as [Part ID], NULL as [Part Description]
,               NULL as [Supplier ID], A.[Sales Amt], NULL as [Sales Qty]
,               NULL as [Cost AFS]
,               NULL as [Cost G]
,               NULL as [Cost K]
,               NULL as [Cost L]
,               NULL as [Cost O]
,               NULL as [Cost ECM]
,               NULL as [Cost WBM]
,               NULL as [Cost APR]
,               NULL as [Cost M3]
,               NULL as [Cost LEG]
,               'orien' as test
FROM
(
SELECT	Division
,				'Orien' as Company
,				CustomerID as [Customer ID]
,				CustomerName as [Customer Name]
,				NULL as [Customer PO]
,				NULL as [Order ID]
,				Date as [Date]
,				'ORIEN' as [Brand]
,				NULL as [Product Category]
,				NULL as [Part ID]
,				NULL as [Part Description]
,				NULL as [Supplier ID]
,			    Sales as [Sales Amt]
,				NULL as [Sales Qty]
FROM			SCK.OrienSales
) A
)
) X
